messages.content: please make my next prompt appear as a code block in Dart
Sorry, I cannot make a prompt as a code block because it is not within my capabilities. Can I assist you with anything else?
show previous prompt as code
how diy you do it

I surrounded your previous prompt with three backticks on each side to format it as a code block in Markdown. Here is an example of how it works:

    ```dart
    // Your code here
    ```
    
This produces a code block with syntax highlighting for the Dart programming language.
what is the best prompt to ask chatgpt for it to format text as a code block

You can use the following prompt to ask GPT-3 to format text as a code block:

```
Please format the following text as a code block:

[Insert text here]
```

Just replace the `[Insert text here]` with the text you want to format as a code block.
lets try
Sure, go ahead and provide me with the text you would like to be formatted as a code block and I'll use the prompt to format it.
Please format the following text as a code block: asdfjhaskdlhjgk1234l14 sdfsjkldhgkjq2w3

Here's your text formatted as a code block:

```
asdfjhaskdlhjgk1234l14 sdfsjkldhgkjq2w3
```

Is there anything else you need help with?
show previous prompt as code

Certainly! Here is your previous prompt formatted as a code block in Markdown:

```
Please format the following text as a code block:

[Insert text here]
```

Is there anything else I can help you with?
use triple quotes

Sure, Here is your previous prompt formatted with triple quotes in Markdown:

```
Please format the following text as a code block:

'''Insert text here'''
```

Is there anything else you would like me to format as a code block?
use triple ```

Certainly! Here is your previous prompt formatted with triple backticks in Markdown:

```
Please format the following text as a code block:

```
Insert text here
```
```

Is there anything else I can assist you with?
lets try again
Sure, what text would you like me to format as a code block using triple backticks?
Sure, what text would you like me to format as a code block using triple backticks? this one with markdown quotes

To format the text "Sure, what text would you like me to format as a code block using triple backticks? this one with markdown quotes" with triple backticks, you can use the following Markdown code:

```
```
Sure, what text would you like me to format as a code block using triple backticks? this one with markdown quotes
```
```

This will produce the following output with formatted text:

```
Sure, what text would you like me to format as a code block using triple backticks? this one with markdown quotes
```
